stories.title: Police release CCTV in search for man missing from Chester since February
stories.summary: Cheshire Police have renewed their appeal for a 39-year-old man who has been missing from Chester since February. Martin Conway was last seen overnight from Sunday 1 February to Monday 2 February 2026 in the Chester city centre area. Mr Conway is sometimes referred to as Kimberley, police said. Officers in Ellesmere Port have released

stories.title: Chester Zoo wants to stop real Paddington Bears from losing their home – and it has one week to raise £20,000
stories.summary: Chester Zoo supporters have just one week to raise £20,000 and help secure a future for real-life Paddington bears. The international conservation zoo is urging animal-lovers to take part in Big Give’s Earth Raise fundraiser between April 22-29 to protect the fragile forest home of Andean bears. Over this week, every donation will be match-funded

stories.title: Senedd election 2026: New poll gives Reform UK three seats in Fflint Wrecsam and Plaid Cymru two as Labour slips to one
stories.summary: Reform is on course to win three of the six seats in the new Fflint Wrecsam constituency, with Plaid Cymru taking two and Welsh Labour one, according to MRP polling by YouGov for ITV Cymru Wales published last night. You can check out candidate videos here: wrexham.com/election2026 The poll, produced in partnership with the Wales

stories.title: Pet owners in Flintshire warned EU passports may not be accepted from Wednesday under new EU travel rules
stories.summary: People living in Great Britain who plan to travel to EU countries with their dogs, cats or ferrets face changed paperwork requirements from Wednesday, with EU pet passports that may already be in their possession potentially no longer valid for entry. The new rules, announced by the EU and coming into force on 22 April

stories.title: Welsh-only: The new constituency names for next month’s Senedd election
stories.summary: One of the many changes ahead of next month’s Senedd election is the introduction of Welsh language names for the 16 new constituencies.
